name: Red Lobster Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Baked potatoes, cooked and peeled, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine clam juice, milk powder, and flour. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a 2-1/2 quart saucepan.
3. Stir in chicken broth, stirring constantly on medium-high heat until thick and smooth.
4. Reduce heat to low.
5. Stir in celery, onions, clams, parsley, and potatoes.
6. Keep on low heat for up to an hour, seasoning with salt and pepper.
7. This recipe freezes well.
Source: Gloria Pitzer's Secret Recipes Newsletter.
